violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH CFP. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The sink & surface sanitizer concentration in the sanitizing solution of sanitization bucket was 170 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the sanitizer must be between 272-700 ppm. PIC changed out sanitizer bucket and concentration was higher. PIC will put in a service order to have sanitizer concentration adjusted. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The double door to the outside, located in the front of the establishment, is not tight-fitting. Observed double door not shutting properly. Per interview with PIC a service order was put in. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (dishwasher). Chlorine sanitizing concentration shall be between 50ppm-100ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust/residue: 1.Fan located in the continental refrigerator 2. Fans in walk-in cooler Non-food surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The floor throughout the kitchen and ware-washing areas is in poor repair (grout missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024 Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

The sink & surface sanitizer concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the sanitizer must be between 704-1875 ppm of lactic acid. PIC was instructed to use dispenser from another location for the sanitizer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/12/2024

The following equipment was observed in poor repair or improper adjustment: 1) The ice guard of the ice machine was missing screws and falling 2) The counters on the cookline were observed improperly welded New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulatino of debris: 1) The fan covers of multiple refrigeration units had dust and biofilm 2) The food storage racks inside of the walk-in cooler had biofilm and other debris New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
The floor throughout the kitchen and ware-washing areas is in poor repair (grout missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
Some ceiling tiles throughout the kitchen, ware-washing, and storage areas are made of a material that is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The ceiling vents have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety certified with RIDOH. Application printed for PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The reach in unit was observed icing over. Units must be maintained in good repair. Unit to be serviced/repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
